calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
RYAN PENHALLEGON, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Daniel C. Irish, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit A through K (bills and Invoices) ------------------ ID/EVID.
After hearing testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Donald Baker ind. and dba The Electricia as follows:
Damages $500,000.00
Fees and Costs memo. to be submitted at a later date.
Counsle stipulated for the return of the exihibits and Judgment signed in open court.
